-   Emit a NAME section properly formatted for whatis parsing by [@​corhere](https://redirect.github.com/corhere) in [https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/124](https://redirect.github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/124)
-   Fix rendering of lists by [@​corhere](https://redirect.github.com/corhere) in [https://github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/122](https://redirect.github.com/cpuguy83/go-md2man/pull/122)
